item.title: Novenas you can start today - 03 March
item.description:
Blessed Angela Salawa
Blessed Beatrix Of Engelport
Blessed Claudius The Minor
Blessed Girolamo Da Recanati
Blessed Giustina Bezzoli Francucci
Blessed Manuel Solorzano
Blessed Nelson Rutilio Lemus Chavez
Blessed Rutilio Grande Garcia
Martyrs Of Nicomedia 12 March
Pope Saint Innocent I
Saint Almut Of Wetter
Saint Alphege The Bald
Saint Basilissa Of Asia
Saint Bernard Of Carinola
Saint Corman Of Iona
Saint Doroteo Of Nicomedia
Saint Egdunus
Saint Fechno
Saint Gorgonio Of Nicomedia
Saint Heiu Of Hartlepool
Saint Indrecht Of Iona
Saint Joseph Zhang Dapeng
Saint Luigi Orione
Saint Maximilian Of Thebeste
Saint Mura Mcferedach
Saint Paul Aurelian
Saint Peter Of Nicomedia
Saint Peter The Deacon
Saint Seraphina
Saint Theophanes The Chronographer

Feast Day: 12 March
Start Date: 03 March
End Date: 11 March
